title: elymus elymoides subsp. hordeoides
intro: Elymus elymoides subsp. hordeoides, also known as slender wildrye, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, native to the western United States and Canada. The medicinal properties of slender wildrye include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of using slender wildrye include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of slender wildrye can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
